mapper.sql: id, job_name, route_key, shard_key, payload_json, execute_time, priority, retry_times, max_retry_times, creator_id, hot_cached, status, claim_owner, claim_time, claim_deadline, dispatch_target, dispatch_note, archive_path, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into sj_job (job_name, route_key, shard_key, payload_json, execute_time, priority, retry_times, max_retry_times, creator_id, hot_cached, status, claim_owner, claim_time, claim_deadline, dispatch_target, dispatch_note, archive_path, create_time, update_time) values (#{jobName}, #{routeKey}, #{shardKey}, #{payloadJson}, #{executeTime}, #{priority}, #{retryTimes}, #{maxRetryTimes}, #{creatorId}, #{hotCached}, #{status}, #{claimOwner}, #{claimTime}, #{claimDeadline}, #{dispatchTarget}, #{dispatchNote}, #{archivePath}, now(), now())
mapper.select:
select
from sj_job where id = #{id} limit 1

select
from sj_job where status = 'WAITING' and hot_cached = 0 and execute_time between #{fromTime} and #{toTime} order by execute_time asc, id asc limit #{limit}

select
from sj_job where status = 'WAITING' and hot_cached = 1 and execute_time <= #{toTime} order by execute_time asc, id asc limit #{limit}

select
from sj_job where status in ('Completed', 'FAILED') and update_time < #{beforeTime} order by update_time asc, id asc

select
from sj_job_archive where id = #{id} limit 1

select
from sj_job_archive order by id desc limit #{limit}

select
from sj_job_archive where archive_path is null or archive_path = '' order by update_time asc, id asc
mapper.update: update sj_job set hot_cached = #{hotCached}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update sj_job set status = 'WAITING', hot_cached = #{hotCached}, claim_owner = null, claim_time = null, claim_deadline = null, dispatch_target = null, dispatch_note = #{dispatchNote}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update sj_job set status = 'WAITING', retry_times = #{retryTimes}, execute_time = #{executeTime}, hot_cached = #{hotCached}, claim_owner = null, claim_time = null, claim_deadline = null, dispatch_target = null, dispatch_note = #{dispatchNote}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = 'WAITING'

update sj_job set status = 'PAUSED', hot_cached = 0, claim_owner = null, claim_time = null, claim_deadline = null, dispatch_target = null, dispatch_note = #{dispatchNote}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = 'WAITING'

update sj_job set status = #{status}, hot_cached = 0, claim_owner = null, claim_time = null, claim_deadline = null, dispatch_target = null, dispatch_note = #{dispatchNote}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status != 'PAUSED'

update sj_job set status = 'WAITING', retry_times = #{retryTimes}, execute_time = #{executeTime}, claim_owner = null, claim_time = null, claim_deadline = null, dispatch_target = null, dispatch_note = #{dispatchNote}, hot_cached = #{hotCached}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update sj_job set status = 'FAILED', hot_cached = 0, claim_owner = null, claim_time = null, claim_deadline = null, dispatch_target = null, dispatch_note = #{dispatchNote}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sj_job_archive (id, job_name, route_key, shard_key, payload_json, execute_time, priority, retry_times, max_retry_times, creator_id, hot_cached, status, claim_owner, claim_time, claim_deadline, dispatch_target, dispatch_note, archive_path, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{jobName}, #{routeKey}, #{shardKey}, #{payloadJson}, #{executeTime}, #{priority}, #{retryTimes}, #{maxRetryTimes}, #{creatorId}, #{hotCached}, #{status}, #{claimOwner}, #{claimTime}, #{claimDeadline}, #{dispatchTarget}, #{dispatchNote}, #{archivePath}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) on duplicate key update job_name = values(job_name), route_key = values(route_key), shard_key = values(shard_key), payload_json = values(payload_json), execute_time = values(execute_time), priority = values(priority), retry_times = values(retry_times), max_retry_times = values(max_retry_times), creator_id = values(creator_id), hot_cached = values(hot_cached), status = values(status), claim_owner = values(claim_owner), claim_time = values(claim_time), claim_deadline = values(claim_deadline), dispatch_target = values(dispatch_target), dispatch_note = values(dispatch_note), archive_path = coalesce(archive_path, values(archive_path)), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.select: select count(1) from sj_job where hot_cached = 1
